title: myosotis verna var. macrosperma
intro: Myosotis verna var. macrosperma, also known as large-seeded forget-me-not, is a variant of the forget-me-not plant, a small annual herb belonging to the borage family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. Its health benefits include treating urinary issues, such as kidney stones and bladder problems, as well as being used as a natural remedy for fever and rheumatism. Myosotis verna var. macrosperma can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusions, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal effects.
